subject: Account password reset
body: Hi, I need help resetting my password. I have tried the self-service portal but it is not sending the email.
summary: Customer unable to reset password via self-service portal.
suggestedAction: Verify email address on file and manually trigger a reset email.

subject: Incorrect charge on my account
body: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately.
suggestedAction: Review transaction history and process refund for the duplicate charge.

subject: Complete service outage affecting our entire team
body: None of our 50 users can log in. This is causing significant business disruption. We need immediate escalation.
summary: Full service outage blocking login for all 50 users.
suggestedAction: Escalate to on-call engineering immediately and open a P1 incident.

subject: Need invoice for tax purposes
body: Could you please send me the invoice for my January and February payments? I need them for my accountant.
summary: Customer requesting invoices for January and February payments.
suggestedAction: Resend invoices to customer email address on file.

subject: API integration not working after update
body: Since your platform update on Monday our API integration has stopped returning data. We are getting 503 errors on all endpoints.
summary: API integration returning 503 errors following recent platform update.
suggestedAction: Check platform update changelog for breaking changes and escalate to engineering if confirmed.

subject: Request to upgrade subscription plan
body: We have grown to 30 users and need to upgrade from Starter to Business plan. Please advise on pricing and migration.
summary: Customer requesting subscription upgrade from Starter to Business for 30 users.
suggestedAction: Send Business plan pricing and initiate upgrade process.

subject: Data export missing records
body: I exported our data last night but records from the last 3 days are missing from the CSV. Is there a known issue?
summary: Data export missing last 3 days of records.
suggestedAction: Investigate export pipeline for recent ingestion lag and provide corrected export.

subject: GDPR data deletion request
body: Under GDPR Article 17 I am requesting deletion of all personal data associated with my account. Please confirm within 72 hours.
summary: GDPR right-to-erasure request requiring response within 72 hours.
suggestedAction: Escalate to DPO and initiate data deletion workflow immediately.

subject: Login page not loading on mobile
body: The login page is completely blank on Safari on iPhone. Works fine on desktop Chrome. This started today.
summary: Login page blank on Safari/iOS, working on desktop.
suggestedAction: Reproduce in Safari and check for CSS or JS compatibility issues introduced in recent frontend deployment.

subject: Suspected unauthorised access to our account
body: We have seen login activity from an IP in Eastern Europe that none of our staff recognise. Please investigate and lock the account.
summary: Suspected unauthorised login from unrecognised foreign IP address.
suggestedAction: Immediately lock account, revoke all active sessions, and notify security team.

subject: Question about data residency
body: Our legal team needs to confirm that all customer data is stored within Australia. Can you provide documentation?
summary: Customer requesting data residency confirmation for Australian storage.
suggestedAction: Provide data residency documentation confirming Australia East region storage.

subject: Onboarding help for new team members
body: We are onboarding 5 new staff next week. Can someone walk us through the admin console and user provisioning?
summary: Customer requesting onboarding assistance for 5 new staff members.
suggestedAction: Schedule onboarding session and share admin guide documentation.

subject: Reports dashboard showing wrong figures
body: The monthly summary dashboard is showing last month's totals instead of March figures. All our reporting is wrong.
summary: Reports dashboard displaying stale month figures instead of current period.
suggestedAction: Investigate dashboard date filter logic and push a hotfix if confirmed as a bug.
